_instructions: Populate this file with your application's data models. Include ID formats, field types, and constraints the agent needs to recognise.

entities._instructions: Copy this block for each entity in your application
entities.name: EntityName

fields.name: field_name
fields.type: string | number | date | datetime-local | enum | boolean
fields._note: Add constraints, special handling notes, or date format requirements here

business_rules._instructions: Agent appends rules observed at runtime — e.g. validation messages, required field combos, status constraints
